title: 这篇文章太难懂了
subtitle: Expressing Difficulty with 难, Using Potential Complements, Reading and Comprehension
assistant_message: Today we learn: expressing difficulty with 难 (nán), using potential complements (Verb + 得/不 + Complement), and talking about reading comprehension.

grammar.point_id: Komplemen Potensial (Kata Kerja + 得/不 + Komplemen)
grammar.explanation: Use 得 for ability/can, 不 for inability/cannot. Structure: Verb + 得/不 + Result (懂, 完, 见).
grammar.explanation_id: Gunakan 得 untuk kemampuan/bisa, 不 untuk ketidakmampuan/tidak bisa. Struktur: Kata Kerja + 得/不 + Hasil (懂, 完, 见).

examples.translation: I can't understand what he is saying.
examples.translation_id: Saya tidak mengerti apa yang dia katakan.

examples.translation: This article is too hard to understand.

grammar.explanation: Use 难 + Verb to express 'difficult to do'. Structure: 难 + Verb.
grammar.explanation_id: Gunakan 难 + Kata Kerja untuk menyatakan 'sulit dilakukan'. Struktur: 难 + Kata Kerja.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Li Mei
dialogue.pinyin: Nǐ kàn dǒng zhè piān wénzhāng le ma?

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zhang Wei
dialogue.pinyin: Tài nán dǒng le, yǒu hěnduō shēngcí.
dialogue.translation: It's too hard to understand, there are many new words.
dialogue.translation_id: Terlalu sulit dipahami, ada banyak kosakata baru.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Li Mei
dialogue.chinese: 慢慢来，多读几遍就清楚了。
dialogue.pinyin: Màn man lái, duō dú jǐ biàn jiù qīngchu le.
dialogue.translation: Take it slow, read it a few more times and it will become clear.
dialogue.translation_id: Santai saja, baca beberapa kali lagi dan akan menjadi jelas.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zhang Wei
dialogue.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì, wǒ huì nǔlì de.
dialogue.translation: You're right, I will work hard.

exercises.question: How do you say 'I can understand this article' using potential complement?
exercises.question_id: Bagaimana mengatakan 'Saya bisa memahami artikel ini' menggunakan komplemen potensial?

exercises.question: What does 难懂 (nán dǒng) mean?
How to say 'I can't understand what he is saying' in Chinese?
exercises.question_id: Bagaimana mengatakan 'Saya tidak mengerti apa yang dia katakan' dalam bahasa Mandarin?
options_id: Saya tidak mengerti apa yang dia katakan
Saya bisa mengerti apa yang dia katakan
Saya tidak mengerti dia mengatakan apa
